task: Author one file-backed StyleSpec with core roles, a Pie category binding, and an inspect-only constraint; render Flowchart, Sequence, and Pie to SVG, PNG, and no-color Unicode without editing product code.

attempts.correction: The first attempt used am verify --style, which the pre-fix CLI rejected; the consumer switched to the documented public library verifyMermaid renderOptions.style path. This session directly caused CLI verify --style enrollment and an end-to-end saved-record example.

observations: All nine public render commands succeeded and produced non-empty artifacts.
The Pie SVG carried the Pro category binding's fill, stroke, and width.
The original semantic slot omitted cue, so no terminal cue was expected; the authoring example now includes cue: outline.
Style-aware CLI verification and saved-record verification needed a clearer single path; the product and guide were updated from this finding.
artifactPolicy: Temporary rendered consumer artifacts remained under /tmp and are intentionally not committed; deterministic repository evidence is generated separately by section-b-brand-evidence.ts.
